description:
Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a build-resume job that uses the zachbrennan/resume:pdflatex Docker image, runs pdflatex -halt-on-error resume.tex, and stores the generated resume.pdf as an artifact that expires after 1 hour. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that depends on build-resume, uses the zachbrennan/resume:deploy image, installs openssh-client, sets up an SSH key from the ID_RSANEW variable, configures SSH to skip host key checking, then copies resume.pdf and resume.tex via scp -P "$PORT" to the remote server family@HiveRacing.cc:/var/www/html/content. The deploy job runs the series of commands: apt-get update && apt-get -y install --no-install-recommends openssh-client; mkdir ~/.ssh; chmod 700 ~/.ssh; eval $(ssh-agent); bash -c 'ssh-add <(echo "$ID_RSANEW")'; bash -c 'echo > /id_rsa.pub <(echo "$ID_RSANEW")'; [[ -f /.dockerenv ]] && echo -e "Host *
	StrictHostKeyChecking no

" > ~/.ssh/config; ls; pwd; scp -P "$PORT" resume.pdf family@HiveRacing.cc:/var/www/html/content; scp -P "$PORT" resume.tex family@HiveRacing.cc:/var/www/html/content.
